feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Smart Table fields not become editable when I press the edit button different behavior on versions
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a question : In SAP BTP I use 2 versions locally of an SAP Smart Table application - In the 1.127.0 version I use the same code as in the 1.96.38 version : 

<mvc:View controllerName="..."  

    xmlns="sap.f"

    xmlns:m="sap.m"

    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"

    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"

    xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar"

    xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable"

    xmlns:sv="sap.ui.comp.smartvariants"

    xmlns:sf="sap.ui.comp.smartfield"

    xmlns:form="sap.ui.comp.smartform"

    xmlns:app="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1"

    height="100%">

 

     <DynamicPage id="dynamicPage" fitContent="true">

        <header>

            <DynamicPageHeader id="_IDGenDynamicPageHeader1">

                <smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar id="smartFilterBar" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored"  enableBasicSearch="true">

                    <smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData1" shrinkFactor="0"/>

                    </smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                </smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar>

            </DynamicPageHeader>

        </header>

        <content>

            <smartTable:SmartTable id="LineItemsSmartTable" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" smartFilterId="smartFilterBar" tableType="ResponsiveTable"  

                enableExport="true" beforeExport="onBeforeExport" useVariantManagement="true" useTablePersonalisation="true" header="{i18n>smartTableHeader}"  

                showRowCount="true" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored" enableAutoBinding="true"  class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"  

                enableAutoColumnWidth="true" editTogglable="true" showDetailsButton="true" detailsButtonSetting="Medium,Low" demandPopin="true"  

                app:useSmartField = "true" editToggled="onEditToggled" placeToolbarInTable="true">  

                    <smartTable:customToolbar>

                        <m:Toolbar id="_IDGenToolbar" >

                            <m:ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer1" ></m:ToolbarSpacer>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://create" enabled = "false" id="_IDGenButton" press="onCreate" text="{i18n>Create}"></m:Button>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://request" enabled = "false" id="_MassChange" press="onMassChange" text="{i18n>MassChange}"></m:Button>

                        </m:Toolbar>

                    </smartTable:customToolbar>

                    <smartTable:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData2" growFactor="1" baseSize="0%"/>

                    </smartTable:layoutData>  

                    <m:Table id="_IDGenTable" growing="true" growingThreshold="20" growingScrollToLoad="true" mode="MultiSelect"  sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar" />

                </smartTable:SmartTable>

        </content>

    </DynamicPage>  

</mvc:View>

The difference is that on the 1.127.0 version when I press the Edit/toggle button the fields are becoming editable and can add values on them, and in the 1.96.38 version the fields are not becoming editable when I press the button and the ones that have no value are showing just a field with a line. I know that the  app:useSmartField = "true" may be not compatible, but do you know any workaround to solve this issue please ?

entry.title: Relationship between space and Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Let me ask a question about the figure in the following URL.
Managing Launchpad Spaces and Pages | SAP Help Portal

In the diagram, Space and Business Catalog are associated with Business Role.
I would like to know what happens if a tile included in Space/Page is not included in the catalog.

・It is not displayed on the page
・It is displayed on the page, but there is no permission to execute it
・It is displayed on the page and can also be executed

Best Regards,
Atsushi Yamada

entry.title: Can I have a scroll bar for sap.m.tree in Mobile devices?
entry.content:
I tried to enclose the tree in a scroll container

<ScrollContainer vertical="true" width="auto" height="{parts: [{path: 'device>/resize/height'}], formatter: '.editHeightOfVSB'}">

The height will be around 80% percent of the container. With this code, I could see two scroll bars while running app in BAS. But in the mobile, I don't see the scroll bars.

The scrolling works but I need to show the bars to let the user know where he is at. 
Thanks for the help in advance.

entry.title: Implement Treasury Executive Dashboard fiori app in on-premise SAP system
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need information regarding the implementation of the "Treasury Executive dashboard" app. The OData service(/SSB/SMART_BUSINESS_RUNTIME_SRV) and UI5 application(SACINTEGS1) are already in active state in the system. However, as mentioned in the Fiori Apps Library, it is a public cloud-based app. Is there any way to integrate this app with an on-premise system?

entry.title: Undefined new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm
entry.content:
Hi,

I have defined the SimpleForm control as below and it has always worked in Neo.

I am testing the same app / control in Foundry Dev subaccount and also works, however when testing in Pre-Prod subaccount sometimes it works and sometimes I have the error: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'SimpleForm').

 
var dialog = new sap.m.Dialog({
                title: sMsgYA,
                type: "Message",
                state: "Success",
                content: [
                    new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm({
                        editable: false,
 
Does anybody know what the error might be?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: SAP Fiori App F0106A SICF service missing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have upgraded from S4 2018 to 2023, SAP Fiori App F0106A SICF service missing /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_receivables is missing .

Kindly help me to resolve the issue.

 

Best Regards,

Supreeth

entry.title: I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.
entry.content:
I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.

 
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" >
                <Collection>                    
                    <Record Type="UI.DataField">                                      
                        <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>category}"/>                    
                        <Annotation Term="HTML5.RowSpanForDuplicateValues" Bool="true"/>
 .............................................
 
I configured it as above, but there is no change on the screen.

 

===============================

HTML5 Vocabulary

Namespace: com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1

Terms for HTML5

The HTML5 vocabulary provides rendering hints for HTML5 clients

Terms

Term Type Description

CssDefaultsCssDefaultsTypeCSS definitions that may be used as defaults
This term can applied to e.g. UI.DataFieldAbstract records
LinkTargetLinkTargetTypeWhere to open a link for the annotated URL
When the UI contains a link to the URL, it shall open as specified by this annotation. This can be achieved, for example, by giving the UI5 sap.m.Link element a corresponding target property. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
RowSpanForDuplicateValues (Experimental)TagThe annotated data field might use a rowSpan for adjacent duplicate values if used in a table.
In order to achieve a good user experience the respective columns should be sorted. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.

entry.title: FPM: Custom Action on Table Navigating to Freestyle View – Routing Issues
entry.content:
Hey everyone 👋,

I'm currently working on a Fiori elements application using the Flexible Programming Model (FPM). Here's what I'm trying to achieve:

I'd like to add a custom action button on a Table Building Block (e.g. <macros:Table>) that allows the user to navigate to a freestyle view. The goal is to show a custom-made UI5 XML view, which contains complex functionality that doesn't fit into a standard Fiori elements layout.

I’ve already implemented the action using the press handler in the table, and the logic itself is working. The problem arises when I try to set up navigation to the freestyle view using routes and targets in the manifest.json.

As soon as I define the new route/target for the freestyle view the application fails to launch entirely, and I get no detailed error messages in the console that help pinpoint the issue.

Has anyone successfully:

  • Added a freestyle view to an FPM-based app?

  • Navigated from a building block (e.g. table action) to that freestyle view?

  • Modified the manifest.json routing correctly to support this?

Any code snippets or working examples would be incredibly appreciated 🙏

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: I want to add additional filters like sold-to-party sap Standard Fiori My Inbox applica
entry.content: Add custom filter in My Inbox.

entry.title: Possibility of Filter shortcut in smart table column menu in newer SAPUI5 versions after 1.133
entry.content:
Dear All

Is there any way we can get the filter button back in the Column menu of Smart table? This was available in older SAPUI5 versions before 1.133 and now the column menu design has changed. I see sorting & grouping is available, but the filter shortcut is unavailable. We need to click on the settings icon to open the Filter tab in the Personalization menu, which is a couple of extra clicks for the users to reach the filter menu, and they were unhappy with the new column menu after ui5 version update.
PS- I have a Smart Table wrapped around a grid table having custom columns. We are running the apps in BTP launchpad.

Column menu look after version 1.133



Before version 1.133 - This filter shortcut is what I need in column menu.



Any suggestions or possible customizations will be really helpful. 

Thanks & Cheers
Naresh

entry.title: Filter Value Help list on the child entity record based on the value from the parent entity record
entry.content:
I'm developing an SAP Fiori application using the RAP model. In my scenario, I'm creating a new record for a child entity. For one of the fields, I needed to implement a value help for lookup functionality. I was able to achieve this using the @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation, as shown below—and it works as expected.

What I’m aiming to do is filter the Value Help list based on a value passed from the parent entity record. When the user clicks on the Help Value (F4) for the field, the Value Help window should open, and the search field should automatically be pre-populated with the value passed from the parent entity record. For example, in the screenshot below, the Value Help window displays the Business Partner search field along with other fields. I want the Business Partner field to be automatically populated with the value "777", which is the value passed from the parent entity record.

 

What’s the recommended approach to implement this kind of filtering?

entry.title: Procurement Overview Page
entry.content:
hi SAP,

 

I am trying to implement the standard Fiori app 'Procurement Overview Page' (

Yes, its working fine when we test the tile.

 

But when we make reference to other Role (ZM_MM_PR_DISP).. I am able to see the tile in my Launchpad. But when I open the app, I didn't get any analytical information.  its empty.

 

We have reviewed sapnote 3420320 - Procurement overview does not show any card, but not clear about it.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: This file has limited permissions. Error in Fiori
entry.content:
Hello all,

In the Fiori dashboard when I open the ME3N transaction and open any contract to view its pdf version in preview format, I get the following error. 'This file has limited permissions. You may not have access to some features. 

The issue is that the print preview loads correctly, but due to permission settings I am not able to print or save the file. And I dont understand where are these permissions coming for as we have not maintained in the system or anywhere else. If I open the transaction ME3N in the GUI as well and follow the same steps I still get the same permission error.

SAP Fiori #ME3N #PDF

entry.title: Production Execution Duration Fiori App Query
entry.content:
Hello, 

do you know what is CDS analytical query for application production execution duration? 
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2172')/S30PCE

In fiori library is mentioned this C_MfgOrderOperationDurationQry but this does not exist in the system - only I_MfgOrderOperationCube but i am looking for the analytics query for the application.

Regards

David

entry.title: Issue with Programmatically Assigning Catalogs to Sections in SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m encountering an issue while trying to streamline the creation and assignment of spaces, pages, sections, and catalogs in the SAP Fiori Launchpad.

Problem Description:

The client requires the creation of more than 1000 spaces, pages, and sections, with the need to assign already existing catalogs to the sections of the pages. I’ve already:

  • Configured all necessary settings and roles.

  • Tested the entire process manually, including creating one space, one page, one section, and assigning catalogs through the Fiori Launchpad Designer.

Manually, the configuration works perfectly. I can display the assigned catalog in the Fiori Launchpad, and everything functions as expected.

Challenge:

The SAP Fiori Launchpad Designer only allows creating and assigning these components one by one, which is not feasible for such a large volume.

Solution Attempted:

To handle this in bulk, I’ve developed an ABAP program in the Workbench that:

  1. Imports data from a .txt file.

  2. Programmatically generates spaces, pages, and sections.

  3. Handles the assignments:

    • Pages to spaces

    • Sections to pages

    • Catalogs to sections

The program updates the relevant tables, including:

  • /UI2/PGSEC, /UI2/PGHEADC, /UI2/PGSECAIC, /UI2/PGHEADCT, /UI2/PGSECAITIC

  • /UI2/PGSECC, /UI2/PGSECCT, /UI2/STHEADCT, /UI2/STHEADC, /UI2/STPGAC.

Upon verifying in the Fiori Launchpad Designer:

  • The catalogs appear as assigned to the sections.

  • However, when I click on the catalog in the Launchpad, nothing is displayed.

If I manually assign the same catalog to the same page and section via the Launchpad Designer, it works perfectly.

Question:

Has anyone faced a similar issue? Is there an additional table or configuration step I might have missed when handling this process programmatically? Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Flexible Work flow for purchase order
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We want to introduce approval level for PO workflow , which sends an email to approver and then complete the workflow. Request you to guide with the steps and process to be implemented.

Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change key in extended standard OData service?
entry.content:
I have a requirement where we need to show the Sales order line item and the Sales Order header item in one app. The Track Sales Order app (F2577) meets most of the requirement however, the business also wants to see the line items in the first page. I've been trying to work out a POC and stumbled on a small issue. Our backend developer extended the standard OData service and added 2 new fields (material # and sales document item) as well as some logic to fetch data. We tested out the service in the gateway client and the data shows up fine. The issue happens when I try to utilize the OData service in a Fiori app. I tried 3 methods:

  1. Adaptation project: I replaced the standard OData service with new OData service. However, when the data is displayed on the table, the salesDocumentItem column gets duplicated with the last item from the get request of a sales document. For example: if the get request fetches the first 20 record of a sales document, the salesDocumentItem column shows the same salesDocumentItem number which happens to be the last item from the get request 
  2. SAP Fiori elements app: I also tried to create a new Fiori elements app and utilize the service, but the same issue happens
  3. Custom Fiori app: I developed a fully custom app but instead of a smart table I used a regular sap.m responsive table with a JSON Model. The issue was solved here, and I am able to see unique salesDocumentItems in its respective column. 

After implementing the JSONModel in the custom Fiori app I realized the issue could be with the key that is implemented in the backend OData service. I noticed in SEGW that SalesDocument was the only key maintained. Ideally, we would need salesdocumentitem to be a key as well since each record is unique to the SalesDocument and salesdocumentitem. When I clicked on edit mode in SEGW and tried to click on "Is Key" for salesdocumentitem, it was blanked out and I actually could not edit any of the other properties. 

My question is, is there a way to change, add, or create a composite key for a standard OData service that has been extended?

entry.title: Error 404 when trying to access a full stack CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have created a full stack CAP application and deployed it in Cloud Foundry. However when trying to access the app via HTML5 repository, I get a blank page and when I open the console, I see a bunch of 404 errors.

 

I have followed a youtube tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z10xke7yli4&list=PL54JdsBCvI0mPwzMkzlNnulw3NaxoWzks&index=23
The steps which I followed were exactly the same, still I am getting this issue.

Steps to reproduce:

1. Clone the github repository: https://github.com/developedbysom/cap-animal-adopt.git

2. Run npm install.

3. Run cds add hana --for production

4. Run cds add xsuaa --for production

5. Run cds add workzone (Since we are using managed approuter, this will also create xs-app.json in app/adopter)
6. Run npm install --prefix app/adopter/

7. Run cds add mta 
8. Run mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.tar && cf deploy gen/mta.tar

I have added my xs-app.json,mta.yaml and manifest.json files as txt in the question.
Please look into this and guide me if I am doing anything wrong.

Thanks,

Regards,

Raihan

entry.title: How to override a custom action after submitting in Fiori Elements?
entry.content:
I have added an action in services using CAPM and used it in list report page. When clicking that action, some task is doing and some changes is happening in the table. After that action, I need to refresh the table or navigate to the object page. How does it possible? 
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Interactive Fragmented/Adobe Forms using Adobe Live Cycle
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Developed fragmented adobe forms using Adobe Live Cycle designer which is linked to RAP model at the backend, currently stuck with one requirement to make the fragmented form interactive as business wants checkboxes to be interactive and should be able to alter checkbox data and save in db the changes from front end. We are currently displaying the adobe form using UI5 front end and using pdf container just to display form.

Can anyone help me making the adobe form/fragmented forms interactive. Any suggestion guiding on the same is really appreciated.

Thanks & Best Regards!!
